summary.lv: Intrum Global Technologies meklē Senior DevOps Engineer, kurš ieviesīs izvietošanas cauruļvadus ar Terraform un Kubernetes, uzturēs platformas infrastruktūru un iestatīs data lakehouse vidi. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €4000–6000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Intrum Global Technologies seeks a Senior DevOps Engineer to implement deployment pipelines using Terraform and Kubernetes, maintain platform infrastructure, and set up data lakehouse environments, offering €4,000–6,000/month.
